name: notion-agent-cli
description: Notion workspace operations via CLI. TRIGGER when the user asks to read, create, edit, copy, merge, split, move, query, search, archive, export, or batch-update Notion pages, databases, or properties — including "duplicate a page", "find duplicates", "compare pages", "replace a section", "add a comment", "apply a template", or "workspace map". DO NOT TRIGGER for general web scraping, non-Notion APIs, or discussion about this plugin's code and benchmarks.
